'''sajofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fiberizer|fiberizer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-j-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fiberizer|fiberizer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sajofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || sæjefeth || sæjefej || sæjefesh || sæjefe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || sajojofoth || sajojofoj || sajojofosh || sajojofo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || sajofoth || sajofoj || sajofosh || sajofo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || sajoffofth || sajoffofj || sajoffofsh || sajoffof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || sajofotho || sajofojo || sajofosho || sajofoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || sajofoth || sajofoj || sajofosh || sajofo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || sajofothol || sajofojol || sajofoshol || sajofokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || sajofoothotho || sajofoojojo || sajofooshosho || sajofooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || sajofothon || sajofojon || sajofoshon || sajofokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || sajofothooro || sajofojooro || sajofoshooro || sajofokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
